Test data for the M1 browser and claimspace loader.

Files:
- 001__people-and-languages.m1
- 002__programs-and-links.m1
- 003__todos.m1

Notes:
- These are hand-made sample transport files.
- UUIDs in these files are test identifiers created for this repository.
- There is currently no pre-existing GUID for the M1 repository in zoo-project.json,
  so the M1 program entity in this test data uses a fresh test UUID:
  b2c3d4e5-1111-49a0-8b01-555555555555
